name: Malajah Steel
ai_summary: Malajah Steel brings diverse childcare experience as a substitute teacher and babysitter for children ages four months to eight years. Living in Atlanta and willing to travel up to 30 miles, she maintains calm, firm discipline while providing engaging activities and building strong connections with children.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Malaysia steel and my experience with in childcare, I have been babysitting assistant for my mother's company, as well as a substitute teacher within Innovation learning and that is from January up until now. And the ages groups that I've worked with is about four months up to eight.
 Years old. And why I like working with kids is because I love going in and seeing the smile on their face when they see me. And I also love, just providing them with new experiences and activities every day and just being able to make them happy.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Atlanta, Georgia and I'm willing to travel at least 30 miles, 20 to 30 miles out from where I'm located.
transcripts.q5:
I will say, I'm looking for a part-time as of right now, I am still serving with Innovation learning and I will go back and forth to different locations, which is leaving me some days out of the week whenever they call me. And it's kind of understand expected. So, I just wanted to find another place that I'll be able to provide me with payment and also what
 something that I am used to within experience wise.
transcripts.q6:
How I deal with conflict between two children is first, I'll always remain calm. Secondly, I will talk to them in a Stern for a manner, telling them what is right? And what is wrong as far as in hitting biting, scratching and yelling at their other classmates, then I will proceed to separate them and provide them with a
 activities. Then I'll make sure to call the higher up and perform in writing an incident report.
transcripts.q7:
I'll make a good up kid, teacher simply because me I've always been very close to children. Children seem to belong with me very on a very different level. I would say, and they always just love me and I love just being able to provide you with different experiences everyday and coming in and making them happy and being able to do different things with them as well.
 Whether it's going outside, just running around with them, providing them with activities, or just watching little movies with them.
